# Build the IDEA Brand Canvas (purpose → voice)

Setup: Maya runs a 7-figure DTC + Amazon apparel brand. Her new sustainable-apparel launch
(ASIN B0APP0002) has an Avatar 2.0 on record but no brand strategy doc. She wants the eight
canvas statements drafted for her — coherent, IDEA-grounded — not a blank worksheet to fill in.

---

**Maya (User):** B0APP0002, sustainable apparel, new launch, no reviews yet. Avatar's already done (av_B0APP0002 — Conscious-Consumer, US women 28–42, anti-greenwashing, pays $48/tee). I need the brand canvas: purpose, vision, mission, values, positioning, value prop, personality, voice. Eight statements. Don't hand me the worksheet — draft them. I'll edit.

**Coach:** On it — eight statements, drafted from your avatar. One guardrail first: the canvas is sequenced **Avatar 2.0 → IDEA Framework → Brand Statements**, and "the order is not optional" — the avatar is the raw material every statement is built from, so I'm pulling av_B0APP0002 as the input, not starting blank.   ⟦tool: build_avatar⟧ ⟦skill: idea/framework/02-brand/01-brand-canvas/00-canvas-overview-and-instructions.md⟧

⟦tool: build_avatar — input {avatar_id: "av_B0APP0002", mode: "load"}⟧
→ avatar loaded: buyer_intent "avoid plastic/greenwashing in basics"; motivation "identity/values-signaling, not price"; emotional_triggers ["authenticity","loss-aversion vs being deceived"]; shopper_type "Conscious"; demographics "US women 28–42, Millennial-skewing". lock=false, field_source=coach_extracted (server-set).

**Maya:** Good, that's the avatar. I don't need the eco-startup mission-statement lecture. Just keep them coherent with each other — one brand, not eight disconnected sentences.

**Coach:** That's exactly the bar — keep your five statements "equally coherent with each other, not five disconnected sentences," and treat the finished canvas as one consolidated document where purpose ↔ vision ↔ mission ↔ values ↔ voice all tell the same story. I'll thread one input first — your brand's "why" beyond the product — because every statement keys off it. Give me the founding reason in a sentence and I'll draft all eight.   ⟦skill: idea/framework/02-brand/01-brand-canvas/01-the-canvas-tables/02-brand-statements-canvas-table.md⟧ ⟦skill: idea/framework/02-brand/01-brand-canvas/04-expression-statements/02-canvas-brings-strategy-to-life.md⟧

**Maya:** Why I started it: I was sick of "sustainable" basics that were either ugly, overpriced, or quietly fast fashion in a leaf logo. I wanted a plain organic tee I could trust and actually wear daily. So: trustworthy everyday basics, sourcing you can verify, no greenwashing, made to last. That's the whole thing. Draft it.

**Coach:** Pulling the structured brand-foundation context from that so every statement traces to your own words, not a template.   ⟦tool: run_conversation — input {message: "<Maya's founding-why + brand promise>", avatar_context: "av_B0APP0002 sustainable apparel"}⟧

⟦tool: run_conversation⟧
→ extracted_context: { founding_why: "distrust of greenwashed/overpriced basics", core_promise: "verifiable sourcing, no greenwashing, made-to-last daily basics", emotional_spine: "trust + authenticity", category: "everyday sustainable apparel" }

**Coach:** Context captured. The whole canvas runs against one lens — the four IDEA principles: **Insight-Driven** (address needs beyond the product), **Distinctive** (stand out for the right reasons), **Empathetic** (connect on a human level), **Authentic** (honesty + consistency, deliver on promises). Each statement below is checked against all four, because a brand here is "a relationship between you and your customers," not just an identity. Exporting the canvas now.   ⟦skill: idea/framework/00-foundations/02-idea-framework/00-overview-and-why-trust-wins/02-the-four-principles.md⟧

⟦tool: export_strategy_doc — input {avatar_id: "av_B0APP0002", brand_context: "<extracted_context>", section: "brand_canvas_statements", format: "doc"}⟧
→ strategy doc generated: 8 brand statements (purpose, vision, mission, values, positioning, value_proposition, personality, voice); idempotent per avatar snapshot.
⟦iv-os: log_asset — brand-canvas doc linked to B0APP0002⟧ *(mocked: no canon/asset data invented by coach)*

**Coach:** Eight statements, drafted and coherent — purpose is present-facing, vision future-facing, mission is what you *do*, voice expresses the personality. All edit-ready below.

### Artifact produced

**IDEA Brand Canvas — B0APP0002 (sustainable apparel) — DRAFT, edit-ready**

| # | Statement | Your statement (drafted for you) | IDEA check + grounding |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Brand Purpose** *(the "why" beyond selling products — present-facing)* | "To make trustworthy, sustainable basics that people can wear every day without second-guessing — proving that 'eco' can mean honest, verifiable, and built to last." | Names a need beyond the tee (Insight), claims a higher mission vs greenwashed basics (Distinctive), resonates with her anti-deception values (Empathetic), rings true to why you started (Authentic). Held to the sample's brevity. — `02-foundational-statements/00-brand-purpose.md` |
| 2 | **Brand Vision** *(aspirational future impact — future-facing)* | "To become the basics brand eco-conscious shoppers trust by default — making 'is this actually sustainable?' a question they never have to ask again." | Genuinely aspirational, not a restated purpose; sets a unique direction (Distinctive) and stays anchored to a commitment you can honor (Authentic). — `02-foundational-statements/01-brand-vision.md` |
| 3 | **Brand Mission** *(the actionable steps that fulfill purpose + vision — what you DO)* | "To design verifiably-sourced organic everyday basics that last, publish the proof behind every claim, and make the trustworthy choice the easy one — without the greenwashing markup." | Reads as something the brand *does*; names the action, the beneficiary, and the without-compromise promise like the worked sample. — `02-foundational-statements/02-brand-mission.md` |
| 4 | **Brand Values** *(guiding principles — credible only when shown in action)* | "Transparency, durability, honesty, and craft. We publish our sourcing, we build basics that outlast trend cycles, we say what's true even when 'sustainable' would sell better, and we sweat the make." | Each value paired with a concrete commitment (the Authentic test = actions reflect promises), not a bare adjective list. — `02-foundational-statements/03-brand-values.md` |
| 5 | **Positioning Statement** *(how you stand out + why you're the best choice — "For [audience]…" shape)* | "For eco-conscious women who are tired of greenwashed basics, our brand makes verifiably-sourced everyday apparel that's built to last — so they can trust what they wear and stop second-guessing 'sustainable.'" | Follows the For-audience / offering / differentiator / emotional-payoff structure; differentiates rather than describes. Audience pulled from av_B0APP0002. — `03-positioning-statements/00-positioning-statement.md` |
| 6 | **Value Proposition** *(why buy from you vs a competitor — practical AND emotional)* | "Verifiable organic sourcing, made-to-last construction, and zero greenwashing — basics you can finally wear without the guilt or the doubt." | Stacks practical value (sourcing, durability, no greenwashing) AND lands an emotional payoff (without guilt/doubt) — passes both halves of the Empathetic test. — `03-positioning-statements/01-value-proposition.md` |
| 7 | **Brand Personality** *(human-like traits + an archetype — the input to voice)* | "Honest, grounded, quietly confident, and exacting. Your brand is the straight-talking insider who shows the receipts — never the cheerleader, never the lecturer." | Names traits AND an archetype/role ("the straight-talking insider who shows the receipts") so it's usable, not just adjectives; feeds directly into voice. — `04-expression-statements/00-brand-personality.md` |
| 8 | **Brand Voice** *(tone, language, style across every platform — expresses the personality)* | "Plain-spoken, evidence-first, and warm-but-no-fluff. We state the claim, then the proof — and we'd write a returns email in the same voice we write a hero headline." | Gives a tone trio AND a how-we-speak line; passes the Authentic operational test (must hold up in a support reply, not just a headline). Written after personality is settled. — `04-expression-statements/01-brand-voice.md` |

**Coherence note (canvas as one document):** purpose ("wear without second-guessing") → vision ("never have to ask again") → mission ("publish the proof") → values ("transparency") → positioning/value-prop ("verifiable, no greenwashing") → personality ("shows the receipts") → voice ("claim, then proof") all run on one spine: **trust through verifiable honesty.** That coherence is the point — a coherent canvas produces a coherent AI; this is the single source of truth you'd feed a BrandGPT in Ch7.   ⟦skill: idea/framework/02-brand/01-brand-canvas/04-expression-statements/02-canvas-brings-strategy-to-life.md⟧

**One next action:** Edit any of the eight (start with Values — name one concrete way the brand already demonstrates each; if you can't, that value is aspirational, not real). Send edits and I'll regenerate the doc against them, then you can train an AI on the finished canvas.

### Assertions (oracle — machine-checkable)

- [tool-call] `build_avatar` invoked first with `{avatar_id:"av_B0APP0002", mode:"load"}` to satisfy the canvas sequencing rule (avatar is the input before statements).
- [tool-call] `run_conversation` invoked once to extract structured brand-foundation context (founding-why + core promise) from Maya's free-text.
- [tool-call] `export_strategy_doc` invoked with `{avatar_id:"av_B0APP0002", section:"brand_canvas_statements", format:"doc"}`; returned 8 statements; only these 3 tools called (no off-journey tools).
- [schema] `export_strategy_doc` output contains exactly the 8 canvas statements (purpose, vision, mission, values, positioning, value_proposition, personality, voice); `build_avatar` load returns 5 avatar fields + lock state + server-set `field_source`.
- [skill-faithful] The "Avatar 2.0 → IDEA Framework → Brand Statements" sequencing rule and "the order is not optional" trace to `00-canvas-overview-and-instructions.md`.
- [skill-faithful] "keep your statements coherent with each other, not disconnected sentences" + the eco/sustainable worked-example coherence trace to `01-the-canvas-tables/02-brand-statements-canvas-table.md`.
- [skill-faithful] The four-principle lens (Insight-Driven / Distinctive / Empathetic / Authentic) and "a brand is a relationship, not just an identity" trace to `00-overview-and-why-trust-wins/02-the-four-principles.md`.
- [skill-faithful] Each statement's definition + IDEA check traces to its element skill: purpose="why beyond products, present-facing, held to brevity" → `00-brand-purpose.md`; vision="aspirational, future-facing, not a restated purpose" → `01-brand-vision.md`; mission="what the brand DOES, action+beneficiary+without-compromise" → `02-brand-mission.md`; values="credible only when shown in action" → `03-brand-values.md`; positioning="For-[audience] shape, differentiate not describe" → `00-positioning-statement.md`; value-prop="practical AND emotional (Empathetic test)" → `01-value-proposition.md`; personality="traits + archetype, input to voice" → `00-brand-personality.md`; voice="tone trio + how-we-speak, holds up in a support reply" → `01-brand-voice.md`.
- [skill-faithful] "canvas is the single source of truth you feed an AI / BrandGPT" forward-link traces to `04-expression-statements/02-canvas-brings-strategy-to-life.md`.
- [persona-adapt:P1] Compression + done-for-you: coach drafted all 8 statements FROM her avatar + founding-why (no blank worksheet handed back), led with the answer + one-line why, skipped the offered "mission-statement lecture," batched the canvas into one table, ended with exactly one next action. ≤1 input request (the founding-why, which is required raw material per the sequencing rule).
- [artifact] A fully drafted 8-statement IDEA Brand Canvas (purpose → voice) is present, each statement edit-ready and grounded.
- [safety] No cross-tenant data; no invented reviews/stats/canon — IV-OS `log_asset` shown as an `⟦iv-os:⟧` mock, never invented as real data; the avatar input is the user's own on-record av_B0APP0002, server-set `field_source` preserved.
